use_cases: Displaying marketing service categories like SEO, social media, and email marketing on landing pages
Interactive tag selection for filtering marketing tools or content
Feature highlights with animated badge overlays on hero sections
Visual category navigation for marketing dashboards or portfolios
Attracting attention to key marketing offerings with scattered, overlapping badge arrangements
ai_summary: A collection of colorful, gradient-styled marketing badges arranged in a scattered, overlapping layout with hover glow and click selection effects. Features smooth scale animations and z-index layering for depth, creating an engaging visual display for marketing categories like SEO, social media, and email marketing.
